details.pattern: saveCustomAgents fire-and-forget IPC with no error handling
details.note: Blocking: partial write safety, silent data loss on IPC failure

details.pattern: No schema validation on IPC handlers for custom agents
details.note: Blocking: corrupt data propagation, no versioning/migration

details.pattern: Unhandled promise rejection on getCustomAgents load with premature loaded() flag
details.note: Non-blocking: natural recovery by reopening dialog, but no error feedback and no retry
